summaries: Patrick Thornton v. Andrea Thornton; Lamar Chancery Court; LC Case : 37CH1:22-cv-00319-SM; Ruling Date: 02/08/2024; Ruling Judge: Sheila Smallwood; Majority Opinion: Barnes, C.J.
